channel.title: f7bd472b-84f6-4a8b-87bb-5f1a9d4cd144_5201 on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in f7bd472b-84f6-4a8b-87bb-5f1a9d4cd144_5201 on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 60197 City Passenger Train RC Set Toy for Kids with Battery Powered Engine Remote Control Bluetooth Connection Railway Tracks & Accessories
item.description: You can find LEGO 60197 City Passenger Train RC Set Toy for Kids with Battery Powered Engine Remote Control Bluetooth Connection Railway Tracks & Accessories with a discount here: ℹ️: Accessory elements include 3 mugs, 3 muffins, a hot dog, croissant, messenger bag and a suitcase with LEGO box inside The included Bluetooth remote is not compatible with older infrared remote-controlled LEGO train sets This product requires batteries (not included). Please refer to the product packaging for types and quantities Operate the train with the 10-speed Bluetooth remote control Drive to the platform and pick up or unload passengers Set the rails in different ways to fit your city&039;s style Features a motorised engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control and opening nose cone, pantograph on the roof and driver’s cabin with opening window and control panel, plus a café car with removable roof and tables, and a passenger car with removable roof, seats and tables Includes 4 LEGO minifigures: 2 passengers, a train conductor and a train attendant Lift off the roof to access the passenger train cabins filled with cool details Also includes a platform with 2 seats and train services map, a full circular track with 16 curved rails and 4 straight rails, plus a buildable train signal pole 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 60266 City Oceans Ocean Exploration Ship
item.description: You can find LEGO 60266 City Oceans Ocean Exploration Ship with a discount here: ℹ️: Ocean Exploration Ship Number of pieces: 745 Includes a team of 8 explorers with LEGO City Adventures TV series hero Harl Hubbs minifigure, stingray and shark figures, plus accessories Manufacturer recommended age: 7+ This multi-vehicle toy also includes a research submarine and helicopter toys, speedboat, shark cage and pirate shipwreck with hidden treasure 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces here: ℹ️: The Star Wars AT-AT figure features posable legs, a posable head with opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and spring-loaded shooters Celebrate the iconic series with this Star Wars 40th Anniversary set, a LEGO brick version of the iconic AT-AT Walker Star Wars building toy This iconic AT-AT Walker also has foldout panels, a speeder bike, winch and bottom hatch so Luke can throw in the thermal detonator element Includes 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Luke Skywalker, General Veers, 2 AT-AT Drivers and 2 Snowtroopers, all with weapons This set will impress for sure when put on display, and it makes a fantastic LEGO Star Wars gift for kids, boys and girls aged 10 plus 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192 here: ℹ️: The gunnery station on this collectible set features a minifigure gunner’s seat and a detachable hull panel with a fully rotating quad laser cannon; an additional quad laser cannon is also mounted on the underside The Millennium Falcon Star Wars model also Includes 4 classic crew minifigures: Han Solo, Chewbacca, Princess Leia and C-3PO, plus 3 Episode VII/VIII crew minifigures: Older Han Solo, Rey and Finn and a BB-8 Star Wars droid figure Exterior features include removable hull panels, a lowering boarding ramp, concealed blaster cannon, a 4-minifigure cockpit with a detachable canopy, interchangeable sensor dishes, upper and lower quad laser cannons and 7 landing legs Fans of the Galaxy far, far away can build and display the ultimate LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon model with this LEGO Star Wars 7,541 piece set, featuring loads of iconic details, plus crew members from the original and sequel Star Wars trilogies The LEGO Star Wars UCS model kit features a main hold features a seating area, Dejarik holographic game, a combat remote training helmet, an engineering station with a turning minifigure seat and a doorway build with passageway decoration 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre modular building set features 5 floors, each with different areas for kids to explore The construction toy features a crane to access the side of the building for kids to work on the mural, plus a stage with a dancing function The model building kit includes lots of toy art, a sewing machine, music, gardening and gaming accessories so kids can create their own scenes Includes a music room, recording studio, chill out zone, art studio, pool and greenhouse, plus slide and platform to move from one floor to another Includes LEGO Friends Paisley, Liann, Olly, Nova, Zac mini-dolls and Pickle the dog, plus Stephanie, one of the original characters, who became Heartlake City mayor The modular style of this building toy lets kids arrange the various levels to create their own design, then switch it up whenever they want Expand the fun: This set combines with the LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Kitchen 41747 (sold separately) for even bigger stories 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link: ℹ️: Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun 🛒 Check the deal!
